primary_dx_title: Pre-existing type 1 diabetes mellitus, in the puerperium
ground_truth_dx_titles: Pre-existing type 1 diabetes mellitus, in the puerperium
Type 1 diabetes mellitus with ketoacidosis without coma
Diseases of the nervous system complicating the puerperium
Endocrine, nutritional and metabolic diseases complicating the puerperium
Patient's other noncompliance with medication regimen

supporting_evidence: DKA/lactic acidosis, in the setting of running out of medications.
kept_candidates.rationale: The patient's severe DKA and lactic acidosis, along with the documented hyperglycemia and metabolic acidosis, provide strong objective evidence supporting this diagnosis.
